signal_evidence.services_demand: October was a strong month across the business. We saw continued momentum in net deposits, new records set across equities, options, prediction markets, and margin and a nice step-up in crypto volumes.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: This also incorporates some increased investment in new growth areas like Prediction Markets and Robinhood Ventures... we're approaching [2026] the same way... invest for growth while delivering profitable growth.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: The blended take rate is kind of in the high $0.60 zone... smart exchange routing really unlocks [competitive pricing] for those that are super active and bringing a ton of volume.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We are not slowing down. The team remains incredibly excited to continue our mission, and there's so much to do. Roadmap is full.
